title: agrostis rupestris subsp. pyrenaica
intro:
Agrostis rupestris subsp. pyrenaica, also known as mountain bent, is a subspecies of the Agrostis rupestris grass, a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe.

The mountain bent is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. It has been traditionally used to treat digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and soothe respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Agrostis rupestris subsp. pyrenaica typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, which is then consumed to reap its health benefits.
